use serde_json::Value;

// GOOD: borrow instead of clone, or use references
fn extract_fields<'a>(data: &'a Value, fields: &[&str]) -> Vec<&'a Value> {
    fields.iter()
        .filter_map(|field| data.get(field))
        .collect()
}

fn merge_configs(base: &Value, overrides: &[Value]) -> Value {
    let mut result = base.clone(); // clone once
    for override_val in overrides {
        if let Value::Object(map) = override_val {
            for (key, value) in map {
                result[key] = value.clone(); // unavoidable for merge
            }
        }
    }
    result
}
